  "verses": [

      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tu mans Kalps Jeh-
kab ne bihstees/ un Israël ne istruhzinajes. Jo rangi/ es at-
pestischu tewi no tahkas Sem-
mes/ un tawn Dsimnumu no winna Zeetuma Semmes. Un
Jehkabs atgreesifees/ un paliks
ar Meern/ un winnain labbi klahfees/ un neweens winnu ist-
truhzinahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu tad ne bihstees mans
Kalps Jehkab/ fakka tas
KUNGS: Jo es etmu pee te-
wim. Jo es darrischu Gallu ar
wiffeem Paganeem/ kurp es te-
wi efinu aisdstinnis/ bet ar tewis
es ne darrischu Gallu / bet es
pahrmahzischu tewi pamehreni/
un ne turrefschu tewi tahdat par
uenoseedsignu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Chis irr tas Wahrds/
las uhs to Praweetu
Jeremiju notikke prett
teein Wilistereem/ pirns Wara-
us Gazu kawe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Redsi / uhdens nahe augscham
no Seemeka Puﬀes / un taps
par ispluhdifschu Uppi/ un pahr-
pluhdihs to Semmi/ un wiffu
kas eekſch tahs irr/ to Pilsfahru/
un kas eekſch ta dsthwo. Un tee
Zilweki brehks/ un wiffi Eedsih-
wotaji tahs Semmes lauks/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No ta flanniga Trohfsna
to Naggu winno stipro Sirgn/
no Grabbefchanas winno Rat-
tu/ un no Ribbe fchanas winno
Skrittetu.Tee Tehwi ne caudfihg
atpakkat pehz teem Behrneem/
winno Rehku Nogurichanas
deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Par to Deenu/ kas nah-
wiffus Wilisterus pohstiht/ un
isdeldelcht Tiru/ un Zihdonu / ar
teem zitteem Paligeem. Jo tas
KUNGS tspohstihs tohs Wilis-
terus/ tohs Attikentschus tahs
Sallas no Kawtona.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kaliums irr pahr Gazu
nahzis/ Askalons irr isdeldehts
ar teem Attikentscheem eektch win-
nu Eeleijahm. Zik ilgi gribbi tu
pats cegraisitees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Waj tu Sohbins ta KUN-
GA! zik ilgi tu ne gribbi mitte-
tees? Leeni jelle tavas Maſſis/
duſi/ un efﬁ kluffu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ka warri tu mitte-
tees / kur tas KUNGS win-
nam Pawehlefscham dewis irr
prett Askalonu / un prett Juh-
ras Mallu/tur irr Wiﬀsch to ee-
zehlis/ uhs turcen irr Wiﬀsch to
fuhtijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rett Monbu takka tas
KUNGS Zebnot/ tas
Israëla Deews ta: Waj
pahr Nebu! jo tas irr pohstihts/
"
